problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to low, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
